archimate:DataObject.name: CELLAR
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Description: Cellar is the common data repository of the Publications Office of the European Union. Digital publications and metadata are stored in and disseminated via Cellar, in order to be used by humans and machines. Aiming to transparently serve users, Cellar stores multilingual publications and metadata, it is open to all EU citizens and provides machine-readable data.
Publisher: The Publications Office of the European Union
Source: https://op.europa.eu/en/web/cellar/cellar-data/metadata/knowledge-graph
LOST view: SV-Datasets Catalogue Solutions
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/CELLARDataObject
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/CELLARDataObject
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DataSetCatalogueDataObject

properties.value: The Publications Office of the European Union

Cellar is the common data repository of the Publications Office of the European Union. Digital publications and metadata are stored in and disseminated via Cellar, in order to be used by humans and machines. Aiming to transparently serve users, Cellar stores multilingual publications and metadata, it is open to all EU citizens and provides machine-readable data.
